name: @viyrockan/fedlearn-adapter
description: On-device LoRA adapter (~150KB) with EWC continual learning

scripts.rename-native: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; if (fs.existsSync('index.js')) fs.renameSync('index.js','native.cjs'); if (fs.existsSync('index.d.ts')) fs.renameSync('index.d.ts','native.d.ts')"
scripts.build: napi build --platform --release && npm run rename-native && tsc
scripts.build:debug: napi build --platform && npm run rename-native && tsc
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && node -e "import { createRequire } from 'module'; createRequire(import.meta.url)('./native.cjs');"
